response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across various domains, including embedded systems (C/C++), but lacks direct experience with embedded networking, security features, or Linux kernel modifications required for the role. While they meet some technical qualifications (C proficiency, English communication), their background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development and higher-level languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Dlang), with no apparent work on LAN-switch firmware, MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or chip-vendor SDKs. Native-level Japanese proficiency is also unconfirmed.
strengths: Strong C and C++ experience, including embedded systems work
Proven ability to learn new technologies and tools quickly
Demonstrated collaboration across teams and problem-solving in complex systems
concerns: No direct experience with embedded networking, security features, or switch firmware development
Lack of evidence for Linux kernel modification or security technologies like MACsec/IEEE 802.1X
Japanese language proficiency (required) is not mentioned or demonstrated
